evals.prompt: ok we've got the SRS and backlog done — let's work through the design. I want to figure out the database structure and API before we start coding
evals.expected_output: Skill reads FULL-SRS.md, presents known context summary, starts Section 1 (System Architecture), asks targeted questions only about deployment/containers/environments, saves 01-system-architecture.md, proceeds through all 7 sections sequentially, compiles FULL-DESIGN.md at the end

Skill detects fresh start (no design-progress.json), verifies PRODUCT-BACKLOG.md exists, creates docs/design/ directory, welcomes user, explains 7 sections, reads SRS to extract known context, begins Section 1 with targeted questions only

evals.prompt: I need to revise the API design section — we decided to add versioning and I also want to change the auth to use refresh tokens
evals.expected_output: Skill detects all 7 sections complete, enters revision mode, shows current Section 3 (API Design) in full, applies changes (versioning + refresh tokens), warns that Section 4 (UI screens) and Section 5 (integrations) may be affected by API changes, offers to update downstream, recompiles FULL-DESIGN.md
